user.title: Connect to OpenClaw Gateway
user.description: Enter the connection details for your OpenClaw gateway instance.

data_description.base_url: The full URL of your OpenClaw gateway (e.g. http://192.168.1.100:18789)
data_description.api_token: Bearer token for authentication. Leave empty if no auth is configured.
data_description.agent_id: The OpenClaw agent to use (default: main)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the OpenClaw gateway. Check the URL and make sure the gateway is running with chatCompletions endpoint enabled.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid authentication. Check your API token.

abort.already_configured: This OpenClaw gateway is already configured.

data_description.prompt: Custom system prompt to prepend to every conversation. Leave empty to use OpenClaw's default.
